buckets.note: score cutpoints for buckets 0..5; bucket = count of cutpoints a score clears. Fit from speechocean762 human labels via an isotonic score->human mapping binned on human_edges_0_10. English only. The two bottom cutpoints (buckets 0->1, 1->2) are re-derived from the negative group (word-level errors): so762's low end is flat so isotonic pins them to 0 and buckets 0-1 are unreachable; they are set from the p33/p67 percentiles of 9 negative scores. Only scores in the negative cluster change bucket; good speech is unaffected.

_meta.note: Base (model) calibration for English, committed to the repo. Per-machine user re-anchoring of phoneme_good is written separately to calibration.json (gitignored), which overrides phoneme_good only. pass_bucket=4: a take 'passes' when it lands in bucket 4-5. insertion_conf_min kept explicit (engine defaults it to 0).
